events.text: 's the directory listing. This is the `conduit` project

contents:

| Entry | Description |
|---|---|
| `src/` | Main source code (

CLI, lib, frontend) |
| `test/` | Test files |
| `docs/` | Documentation and

opencode/` | OpenCode config/skills |
| `.storybook/` | Storybook config |
| `package.json` | Node

config.ts` | Unit test config |
| `AGENTS.md` | Agent instructions |
| `biome.json` | Linter

turns.prompt: Create a file called /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt with the text 'hello world'

events.content: You must read file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt before overwriting it. Use the Read tool first

<path>/tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: goodbye world

(End of file - total 1 lines)
</content>

turns.prompt: Edit the file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt and change 'hello' to 'goodbye'

metadata.diff:
Index: /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
===================================================================
--- /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
+++ /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt
@@ -1,1 +1,1 @@
-hello world
\ No newline at end of file
+goodbye world
\ No newline at end of file

turns.prompt: Read the file /tmp/e2e-test-diff.txt and tell me its contents

events.content:
